artifacts.name: verified_microbench
artifacts.paper_role: diagnostic only after paper downgrade; not a headline baseline or hero result

artifacts.name: verified_microbench_methodology_run
artifacts.paper_role: progress evidence only; not the paper figure source

artifacts.name: qos_sqlite_hero_bundle
artifacts.paper_role: single-bundle SQLite recovery evidence; statistical metadata is tracked by qos_sqlite_hero_methodology

artifacts.category: methodology-strengthened repeated SQLite QoS workflow run
artifacts.name: qos_sqlite_hero_methodology
artifacts.paper_role: progress evidence for repeated SQLite QoS methodology; paper source remains the single workflow bundle

artifacts.name: keyplane_rekey_workflow
artifacts.paper_role: single-bundle workflow evidence; statistical metadata is tracked by keyplane_rekey_methodology

artifacts.name: keyplane_rekey_methodology
artifacts.paper_role: progress evidence for repeated key-plane workflow methodology; paper source remains the single workflow bundle

artifacts.name: frozen_aegisq_contract
artifacts.paper_role: warm-cache AEGIS-Q result only; not a cross-system comparison and not a cold-cache row

artifacts.name: frozen_gocryptfs_contract
artifacts.paper_role: warm-cache gocryptfs baseline row only; not a full filesystem comparison matrix and not a cold-cache row

artifacts.name: frozen_plaintext_contract
artifacts.paper_role: warm-cache plaintext lowerfs baseline row only; not a full filesystem comparison matrix and not a cold-cache row

artifacts.name: kernel_baseline_feasibility
artifacts.paper_role: explains why fscrypt/dm-crypt frozen rows remain open on this host; not a benchmark result

artifacts.name: fscrypt_dmcrypt_reference_fio
artifacts.paper_role: historical repository artifacts only; not current paper comparison evidence

background_process_control.required: Record process snapshot and declare unrelated CPU/GPU/storage jobs absent.

cache_dropping_policy.cold: Cold-cache measurements require sync, unmount/remount or a privileged drop_caches step; if unavailable, mark the cold-cache row invalid.
cache_dropping_policy.warm: Warm-cache measurements require an untimed priming pass.

confidence_interval_method.name: nonparametric bootstrap
confidence_interval_method.unit: independent repetitions for headline comparisons; transaction samples may be summarized but do not replace independent repetitions

cpu_gpu_clocks_or_power_mode.clock_state: record jetson_clocks --show or equivalent; missing capture invalidates headline runs

failure_handling.rule: A mode with command failure, missing raw logs, failed integrity check, missing mount log, or missing metadata is invalid. Scripts must not synthesize zeros for unsupported configurations.

outlier_policy.rule: Retain all completed repetitions. Exclude only predeclared infrastructure failures with raw log, exit status, and reason; do not winsorize or silently drop slow runs.

run_count.diagnostic_exception: Three-run primitive measurements are allowed only when labeled diagnostic/descriptive and excluded from abstract or baseline-superiority headline claims.

thermal_logging.failure_rule: Any thermal-throttle or clock-cap indication invalidates the headline run unless the paper labels it as a thermal-throttled case study.
thermal_logging.required: tegrastats or equivalent raw thermal/power log for the whole measured interval

warmup.rule: Each performance mode must run an untimed warmup: at least one full workload pass for fio-style profiles or explicit workload-specific warmup transactions before measured samples.
